name: cursor-cli-goal
title: cursor-cli-goal
description: Generic Cursor CLI workflow that actively investigates available Riela workflows at each step, defines and reviews a goal, creates and reviews an in-session plan without writing plan files, performs the work with Composer 2.5, uses GPT-5.5 for the other steps, may delegate to a more specific workflow when appropriate, and reviews goal completion before looping back to work or planning.
